macro.title: The Dow is poised to retake 50,000 as Cisco jumps, Boeing gains: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: A rally in the technology sector drove the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to new intraday and closing records on Wednesday.

macro.summary: Versant, the portfolio of TV networks spun out from Comcast, reported earnings for its first quarter as an independent company.

macro.title: Meta’s New Reality: Record High Profits. Record Low Morale - WIRED
macro.summary: Next week, Meta is cutting about 10 percent of its staff. WIRED spoke with more than a dozen current and former employees about what it's like inside a company where "everyone is unhappy."
